시편 64:1.content: Hear my voice, God, in my complaint. Preserve my life from fear of the enemy.

시편 64:2.content: Hide me from the conspiracy of the wicked, from the noisy crowd of the ones doing evil;

시편 64:3.content: who sharpen their tongue like a sword, and aim their arrows, deadly words,

시편 64:4.content: to shoot innocent men from ambushes. They shoot at him suddenly and fearlessly.

시편 64:5.content: They encourage themselves in evil plans. They talk about laying snares secretly. They say, “Who will see them?”

시편 64:6.content: They plot injustice, saying, “We have made a perfect plan!” Surely man’s mind and heart are cunning.

시편 64:7.content: But God will shoot at them. They will be suddenly struck down with an arrow.

시편 64:8.content: Their own tongues shall ruin them. All who see them will shake their heads.

시편 64:9.content: All mankind shall be afraid. They shall declare the work of God, and shall wisely ponder what he has done.

시편 64:10.content: The righteous shall be glad in Yahweh, and shall take refuge in him. All the upright in heart shall praise him!
